case_title: CHASE MANHATTAN BANK USA, N.A. VS. EDDIE THREADGILL et al

docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE MATTERS SPECIFIED IN PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS, SET #1, BE DEEMED ADMITTED. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS AN ABUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS AN ABUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $382.60 AND ARE TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN

calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-20-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Teena Paxton.
Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Chase Manhattan Bank USA.
No appearance by the Defendant: Eddie Threadgill.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Principal $9,898.76
Prejudgment interest at the rate of 10%.
Costs $193.30
Attorney's Fees $1,500.00
For the total of $12,332.44.
Counsel to prepare Judgment.

Sept. 20, 2004
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
